violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the stand up freezer. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2024
The floor in the kitchen was observed with broken tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to fix broken tiles. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2025

The back storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, pest droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean all corners of storage area and remove any unneeded equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2024
